/usr/bin/c++     CMakeFiles/xmlRader.dir/src/xml/xmlReader.cpp.o  -o xmlRader  -Wl,-rpath,/home/a759/ocs2_ws/src/raisimLib/raisim/linux/lib ../../raisim/linux/lib/libraisim.so -lpthread ../../raisim/linux/lib/libraisimPng.so ../../raisim/linux/lib/libraisimZ.so ../../raisim/linux/lib/libraisimODE.so ../../raisim/linux/lib/libraisimMine.so
